allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\iTeam\\thirdYear\\PFA\\projet_pfaa\\leave-management-microservices"; $timeout = 90; $elapsed = 0; while \($elapsed -lt $timeout\) { $status = docker compose ps --format json 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json; $notHealthy = $status | Where-Object { $_.Service -in @\('employee-db','leave-db','kafka'\) -and $_.Health -ne 'healthy' -and $_.Health -ne '' }; if \(-not $notHealthy -or \($status | Where-Object {$_.Service -eq 'employee-db'}\).Health -eq 'healthy'\) { break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $elapsed += 5 }; docker compose ps)

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\iTeam\\thirdYear\\PFA\\projet_pfaa\\leave-management-microservices"; $timeout = 90; $elapsed = 0; while \($elapsed -lt $timeout\) { $h = \(docker inspect --format='{{.State.Health.Status}}' kafka 2>$null\); if \($h -eq 'healthy'\) { break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $elapsed += 5 }; Write-Output "kafka health: $h after $elapsed s")

PowerShell(foreach \($port in 8081,8082,8085\) { $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { $p = Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess; Write-Output "Port $port : LISTENING \(PID $\($p.Id\), $\($p.ProcessName\), started $\($p.StartTime\)\)" } else { Write-Output "Port $port : free" } })

PowerShell($timeout = 90; $elapsed = 0; $ok = $false; while \($elapsed -lt $timeout\) { $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8082 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $ok = $true; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $elapsed += 5 }; Write-Output "leave-service listening: $ok after $elapsed s")
